g.text: without lenses: deep update requires rebuilding every intermediate layer
with lenses: compose the path once

g.id: use set or over for any depth
g.text: use set or over for any depth
n levels of nesting = n levels of manual reconstruction; adding a level touches every caller

g.id: use set or over for any depth.path
use set or over for any depth.set_or_over
use set or over for any depth.result
g.title: Lenses compose with (.). Adding a new nesting level means extending the path by one segment.

g.id: use set or over for any depth.view_op
use set or over for any depth.traverse_op
use set or over for any depth.(path -> set_or_over)[0]
use set or over for any depth.(set_or_over -> result)[0]
use set or over for any depth.(path -> set_or_over)[1]
use set or over for any depth.(path -> view_op)[0]
use set or over for any depth.(path -> traverse_op)[0]

g.title: Lenses compose with (.). Adding a new nesting level means extending the path by one segment.
